bodyText:

What is Section 80IAC Startup Tax Exemption | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

Section 80IAC tax holiday for DPIIT-recognized startups. 3-year 100% deduction on profits. Eligibility, application, compliance. Expert advisory.

Our practice helps eligible startups claim the Section 80IAC deduction — a 100% tax exemption on profits for 3 consecutive years out of the first 10 years from incorporation. Eligibility requires: DPIIT recognition as a startup, incorporation after April 1, 2016, annual turnover not exceeding Rs. 100 crore, and Inter-Ministerial Board certification. Our services include: DPIIT recognition application, IMB application preparation with innovation documentation, optimal year selection strategy for the 3-year window, return filing with 80IAC claim, and response to assessment queries. We have successfully obtained 80IAC certification for 50+ startups.
Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

Virtual Auditor brings a unique combination of professional credentials (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer) and technology-driven service delivery. Our digital-first approach enables efficient engagement management with real-time status tracking for clients. We maintain strict confidentiality through secure document handling protocols and encrypted communication channels. Our team provides responsive support with dedicated relationship managers for each engagement. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and a pan-India service capability through our digital infrastructure, we serve clients ranging from startups to listed corporations. Contact us for a free initial consultation to discuss your specific requirements and receive a customized service proposal.
